case_title: RIEMAN, ARTHUR M. VS BUZNET A PARTNERSHIP et al

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIEMAN, ARTHUR M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BUZNET A PARTNERSHIP BATT, ANTHONY AS AN INDIVADUAL NO CLEAR CONTRACT ENTERED INTO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
